any language barriers. CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the patient's ability to express ideas and wants at the time of admission. Includes verbal and non-verbal expression; excluding any language barriers. 1 = Rarely/Never expresses self or speech is very difficult to understand
2 = Frequently exhibits difficulty with expressing needs and ideas
3 = Exhibits some difficulty with expressing needs and ideas (e.g., some words or finishing thoughts) or speech is not clear
4 = Expresses
